title: GlazedDragonSword
description: This mod add a powerful sword-Glazed Dragon Sword to the game add it can kill all original entites.
body:
# 鎏龙之刃 (Glazed Dragon Sword)
一把降临于我的世界的终极神器，掌控无限力量与雷霆之威。

## 武器特性
- ⚔️ 攻击伤害：无限
- ⚡ 攻击速度：无限
- 🛡️ 右键：触发格挡动画或蓄力动画
- ⚡ 松开右键：召唤闪电，对附近所有实体造成毁灭性打击

本模组使用[MCreator](https://mcreator.net/)制作。

---

# Glazed Dragon Sword
The ultimate divine weapon in Minecraft, with infinite power and lightning fury.

## Features
- ⚔️ Attack Damage: Infinite
- ⚡ Attack Speed: Infinite
- 🛡️ Right-Click: Play block animation or Power-up animation
- ⚡ Release Right-Click: Summon lightning to strike all nearby entities

Made with [MCreator](https://mcreator.net/).
